<!-- @license lucide-static v1.17.0 - ISC -->
<svg
  class="lucide lucide-zap"
  xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
  width="14"
  height="14"
  viewBox="0 0 24 24"
  fill="none"
  stroke="currentColor"
  stroke-width="2"
  stroke-linecap="round"
  stroke-linejoin="round"
>
  <path d="M4 14a1 1 0 0 1-.78-1.63l9.9-10.2a.5.5 0 0 1 .86.46l-1.92 6.02A1 1 0 0 0 13 10h7a1 1 0 0 1 .78 1.63l-9.9 10.2a.5.5 0 0 1-.86-.46l1.92-6.02A1 1 0 0 0 11 14z" />
</svg>
Relay started as an internal tool at a 12-person startup that was spending 19 hours a week in sync meetings. We got that to two. Then our investors asked to use it.

<!-- @license lucide-static v1.17.0 - ISC -->
<svg
  class="lucide lucide-zap"
  xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
  width="14"
  height="14"
  viewBox="0 0 24 24"
  fill="none"
  stroke="currentColor"
  stroke-width="2"
  stroke-linecap="round"
  stroke-linejoin="round"
>
  <path d="M4 14a1 1 0 0 1-.78-1.63l9.9-10.2a.5.5 0 0 1 .86.46l-1.92 6.02A1 1 0 0 0 13 10h7a1 1 0 0 1 .78 1.63l-9.9 10.2a.5.5 0 0 1-.86-.46l1.92-6.02A1 1 0 0 0 11 14z" />
</svg>
We're 23 people across 9 countries, and we run the company on Relay itself. No daily standups, two meetings a week, and a written culture that makes every decision searchable.
It's not for everyone. It is for people who like deep work and dinner.

<!-- @license lucide-static v1.17.0 - ISC -->
<svg
  class="lucide lucide-zap"
  xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
  width="14"
  height="14"
  viewBox="0 0 24 24"
  fill="none"
  stroke="currentColor"
  stroke-width="2"
  stroke-linecap="round"
  stroke-linejoin="round"
>
  <path d="M4 14a1 1 0 0 1-.78-1.63l9.9-10.2a.5.5 0 0 1 .86.46l-1.92 6.02A1 1 0 0 0 13 10h7a1 1 0 0 1 .78 1.63l-9.9 10.2a.5.5 0 0 1-.86-.46l1.92-6.02A1 1 0 0 0 11 14z" />
</svg>

<!-- @license lucide-static v1.17.0 - ISC -->
<svg
  class="lucide lucide-message-square-text"
  xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
  width="20"
  height="20"
  viewBox="0 0 24 24"
  fill="none"
  stroke="currentColor"
  stroke-width="2"
  stroke-linecap="round"
  stroke-linejoin="round"
>
  <path d="M22 17a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6.828a2 2 0 0 0-1.414.586l-2.202 2.202A.71.71 0 0 1 2 21.286V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h16a2 2 0 0 1 2 2z" />
  <path d="M7 11h10" />
  <path d="M7 15h6" />
  <path d="M7 7h8" />
</svg>
If it matters, it's written. Meetings are for debate, documents are for decisions.

<!-- @license lucide-static v1.17.0 - ISC -->
<svg
  class="lucide lucide-clock"
  xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
  width="20"
  height="20"
  viewBox="0 0 24 24"
  fill="none"
  stroke="currentColor"
  stroke-width="2"
  stroke-linecap="round"
  stroke-linejoin="round"
>
  <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" />
  <path d="M12 6v6l4 2" />
</svg>
We measure ourselves by output per calm hour, not hours logged.

<!-- @license lucide-static v1.17.0 - ISC -->
<svg
  class="lucide lucide-users"
  xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
  width="20"
  height="20"
  viewBox="0 0 24 24"
  fill="none"
  stroke="currentColor"
  stroke-width="2"
  stroke-linecap="round"
  stroke-linejoin="round"
>
  <path d="M16 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H6a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2" />
  <path d="M16 3.128a4 4 0 0 1 0 7.744" />
  <path d="M22 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-3-3.87" />
  <circle cx="9" cy="7" r="4" />
</svg>
Every person owns something whole. Nobody waits for permission to fix what they find.
We're hiring across product, design, and engineering.

meta_description: Relay is a 23-person remote team building calmer teamwork.
name: relay_about
